data.title: BTC +0.82% to $113,254.92, ETH -1.42% to $4,124.28, XRP +2.82% to $2.91. Market cautious, BTC sees rebound.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced slight gains on Wednesday, with Bitcoin up 0.82% at $113,254.92, Ethereum down 1.42% at $4,124.28, XRP up 2.82% at $2.91, Solana down 1.65% at $210.87, and Dogecoin up 0.29% at $0.2398. Bitcoin almost hit $114,000 after a recent sell-off, while Ethereum dropped to $4,081.35, 16.82% below its record high. Bitcoin's market dominance rose to 58%, with altcoins excluding Ethereum making up over 29%. $270 million was liquidated from the market in 24 hours, with $186 million in long liquidations. Bitcoin's open interest fell 1.35%. A decrease in open interest alongside a price rise typically indicates short sellers closing their positions. More than 55% of Binance traders with open BTC positions.

data.title: Rubicon Organics presents at Small Cap Discoveries in Vancouver and Planet MicroCap Showcase in Toronto in 2025. TSXV: ROMJ, OTCQX: ROMJF.
data.description: Rubicon Organics Inc., a top premium licensed producer in Canada specializing in organic certified cannabis products, will be taking part in two upcoming investor-focused events. The company will be attending Small Cap Discoveries in Vancouver on September 29–30 and the Planet MicroCap Showcase in Toronto on October 21–23. Rubicon Organics trades as TSXV: ROMJ and OTCQX: ROMJF.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up; indexes steady but Astera Labs and hot stocks stumble. Indices fall; Astera Labs and Credo Technology stand out.
data.description: On Wednesday, stock indexes experienced slight declines, with notable companies like Astera Labs and Credo Technology standing out as winners during the fall season. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures showed a rise, and although the indexes held steady, many popular stocks, including Astera Labs, saw a decrease in value. The overall performance of the market on Wednesday was mixed, with some stocks showing resilience while others faced significant drops.
